title: Houston's Pony Music Pack
description: A simple resource pack to replace the stock music with songs from multiple pony musicians!
body:
A simple resource pack that replaces stock minecraft music and ambience with music by Vylet Pony, Azure Comet, Princewhatever, Koa, and Feather.

The music in this resource pack contains explicit language, listener disgression is advised 

All rights reserved to their respective artists. more info can be found in the credits file.

now go sing a song about life!

V 1.5 onwards has now-playing support! install the [now playing](https://modrinth.com/mod/now-playing) mod to see the name of whatever track is playing! supported languages are english, spanish, and Equish (full and minimal, provided by the Love and Tolerance resource pack).
